title: NeuroD1 Instructs Neuronal Conversion in Non-Reactive Astrocytes
claim_summary: NeuroD1 overexpression in microglia induces apoptosis rather than transdifferentiation into neurons, challenging claims that microglia can be reprogrammed into neurons via NeuroD1.
stated_reason: Owing to insufficient rigor, several images in the supplementary figures contained obvious errors. Two images in Figure S3B appear to have overlapping fields of view; a similar issue occurred in S2B. The authors state the images were acquired from separate fluorescence channels of different confocal images and are not reused images.
selection_method: Search: Neuron 2025 correction figure error claim stands. Surfaced via The Transmitter coverage 2025-06-26. Cited 74 times - low-moderate fame, no mainstream press, niche: microglia reprogramming controversy. Notice DOI confirmed via The Transmitter article. Conclusions explicitly defended by first author and outside expert.
corpus_scope: Supplementary figure image errors in neuroscience cell-conversion debate, 2021-2025
